stem:
Task: select the most suitable fabric for a lightweight outdoor DWR windbreaker.
Hard constraints (must): Water repellency must be at least 4/5; Breathability must be at least 3/5; Weight must not exceed 150 gsm.
Soft preferences (prefer, weighted): Stronger water repellency; Higher breathability and comfort; Better abrasion resistance and durability; Quieter with better handfeel (combined noise/handfeel score; higher is better); Lower weight (lower gsm is better); Lower cost (1=low cost, 5=high cost); Shorter lead time (1=short lead time, 5=long lead time).
Choose the best option among the four candidates (A/B/C/D).

must_sample: Water repellency must be at least 4/5
Breathability must be at least 3/5
Weight must not exceed 150 gsm

Hard constraints (must): Weight must not exceed 120 gsm (lightweight requirement); Water repellency must be at least 3/5; Cost level must not exceed 3 (budget constraint).
Soft preferences (prefer, weighted): Stronger water repellency; Higher breathability and comfort; Better abrasion resistance and durability; Quieter with better handfeel (combined noise/handfeel score; higher is better); Lower weight (lower gsm is better); Lower cost (1=low cost, 5=high cost); Shorter lead time (1=short lead time, 5=long lead time).
Choose the best option among the four candidates (A/B/C/D).

must_sample: Weight must not exceed 120 gsm (lightweight requirement)
Water repellency must be at least 3/5
Cost level must not exceed 3 (budget constraint)
